scripts.build: pnpm --filter @sinter/audio-core build && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @sinter/audio-core build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit
scripts.bench:phrases: pnpm --filter @sinter/audio-core build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && node dist-node/lyrics/bench-phrases.js
